text.title: Solution Assessment Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Was a baseline captured before launch?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run full solution assessment with KPI deltas + recommendations.

example.trace: baseline=yes → live=8 weeks → run assessment; 4 KPIs measured, conversion +31.9%, mobile parity missed.
